title: Academic Appeal - Step by Step Guide
content:
Academic Appeal Process
Morgan State University - Office of Academic Affairs

This guide is for FACULTY AND STAFF use. Students submit appeals; faculty/staff review and respond.

Contact: AcademicAffairs_assistance@morgan.edu
Tango Tutorial: https://app.tango.us/app/workflow/Academic-Appeal-in-Smartsheet-611a7d2f6f9b4deda3da1cc1b6024281

---

OVERVIEW OF THE APPEAL PROCESS
Student submits an academic appeal. A PDF titled "Preliminary Appeal" is attached to the request. The instructor is required to respond within 5 business days. All submissions are reviewed by the department chairperson.

---

INSTRUCTOR RESPONSIBILITIES

LOG IN: Access via Websis Self-Service Faculty under "Service Requests".

VIEW THE APPEAL: Click on the student's row to open the details panel. Navigate to the attachments tab to view the student's preliminary appeal PDF.

RESPOND TO THE APPEAL:
- Visible comments: Enter your response in the designated response field.
- Last date of communication: Record the most recent date of communication with the student.
- Internal-only comments: Use the comments tab for internal notes (not visible to the student).
- Attachments: Use the attachments tab to upload supporting documents. Important: Redact any information about other students.

MAKE A DECISION:
- Resolved: The appeal is resolved. No further action needed.
- No Resolution: The appeal is forwarded to the Chairperson for further review.
- Click SAVE after making your decision.

---

CHAIRPERSON RESPONSIBILITIES

LOG IN: Access via smartsheet.com using Morgan credentials.

VIEW THE APPEAL: The instructor's response appears highlighted in yellow. If the field is blank, the instructor did not respond within the required 5 business days.

RESPOND TO THE APPEAL:
- Visible comments: Enter your response in the response column.
- Internal comments: Click the comment icon for internal-only notes.
- Attachments: Click the paperclip icon to upload supporting documents. Redact any information about other students.

MAKE A DECISION:
- Resolved: The appeal is resolved. No further action needed.
- Pending: Request more information from the involved parties. Enter the role of the person you are requesting information from in the "Additional Info Requested" field.
- No Resolution: The appeal is forwarded to the Dean for further review.
- Click SAVE after making your decision.

Note: Chairperson/director will have the ability to select a department committee in a future update.

---

DEAN RESPONSIBILITIES

LOG IN: Access via smartsheet.com using Morgan credentials.

VIEW THE APPEAL: The instructor's response appears highlighted in yellow. The chairperson's response appears highlighted in purple.

RESPOND TO THE APPEAL:
- Visible comments: Enter your response in the response column.
- Internal comments: Click the comment icon for internal-only notes.
- Attachments: Click the paperclip icon to upload supporting documents. Redact any information about other students.

MAKE A DECISION:
- Resolved: The appeal is resolved. No further action needed.
- Pending: Request more information from the involved parties. Enter the role of the person you are requesting information from in the "Additional Info Requested" field.
- No Resolution: The appeal is forwarded to Academic Affairs for final review.
- Click SAVE after making your decision.

---

STUDENT NOTIFICATION
The student receives a final email with the details and outcome of their appeal once the process is complete.

For the full official guide with screenshots, view: [Academic Appeal Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/13VaJNv3-9nF41y-eVZtvaDXi-mtmkVBE/view)
